platformer2: ^My… I can really feel the unrest thrashing beneath your mask of indifference.
^As expected, the source of the clouds is hardly a mystery.
^Anyway, I’m guessing you need help getting the power back on?
^Indeed. I’m aware you have an… aversion to troubled weather.
^But you have returned yet again, and thus I trust—
^Yes, you need me to find the breaker.
^Wonderful! Truly, nothing compares to the beauty whispered in quiet melodies of hope—
^Ah, I apologize. I’m getting ahead of myself again.
^Take this lamp, it will help light your way forward.
firsttask_gotpower: ^Isn’t it always so beautiful? To see life stir anew.
^I hope it was not too much trouble.
^It was okay. Noisy, like how I remember it.
^If I may ask, what rouses this pandemonium of yours?
^It is louder than either of us are familiar with.
^Ugh, it’s hard to put into words. I-I’ve never felt that it was difficult to… know how to live?
^I guess, in the sense where I always knew what I had to do.
^How I should live, what I should do. There was always a correct answer.
^But this isn’t like that. I feel like I’m going against everything I’ve come to perceive as correct.
^Or rather—I don’t even know what that means. Were things always so difficult?
^Slow down, dear. Your turmoil may shut the lights off once more.
^Your voice is being buried beneath cacophonies of fear, of uncertainty.
^Seek out the noise; listen to them, then silence them.
secondtask_bugscleared: ^Ah, my apologies! I was absorbed in the familiar rhythms of my paintbrush.
^I guess so. I thought I knew this already, but…
^I didn’t realize what having someone, uhh, would mean.
^Because everyone has space in their world for others, right?
^Afraid you’ll return to find it vacant.
^Wondering why you ever strayed from the easy world you once knew.
^Fufufu. I apologize, provocation was not my intention.
^After all, to brave the unknown and uncover the mystery of romance is only human.
^Calamity is a worthwhile consequence. To live easily is to not live at all.
^You’re making it all sound awfully profound.
^Oh? Would you rather I imitate the crows’ dullness, their monotonous stature?
^As I thought. Anyway, I believe you know where the right words will be found.
^Not yet, but worry not. Resolve carries a warmth unlike any other.
^Thank you for the calm that you have returned to this place.
lasttask_enterportal: ^The gate to your next destination reveals itself.
